title: REXEL county 200/6 staples (boxed 5000)
features: Sutiable for use with Rexel tackers
Package Dimensions: 2.7 L x 7.8 H x 7.0 W (centimeters)
description: Made to Rexel’s exacting standards of quality, Rexel 200/6 Staples provides accurate, trouble-free stapling and are recommended for use with Rexel tackers. With a staple leg length of 6 mm, these staples are ideal for tacking items to notice boards and office dividers. The large pack size of 5, 000 staples also means you won’t have to continually buy new staples, making them an ideal purchase.
